历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 4252 → 4441 → 4299 → 5308 → 5193. From 2021 to 2023, it remained stable in the 4200–4400 range, but in 2024 it significantly shifted back to 5308, and in 2025 it slightly recovered to 5193. Over the past two years, the overall ranking has shifted back by about 900 places, with a baseline of approximately 5193 in 2025. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 79 in 2021, 77 in 2022, 82 in 2023, 81 in 2024, and 86 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 78, a reduction of about 9.3% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 32nd, with recent rankings stable in the 25–32 range, making it a top domestic engineering institution. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly due to 34 negative public opinions triggered by a campus voyeurism incident, which may suppress candidates' application psychology. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 87th (average), with relatively low short video exposure. It has A+ in Light Industry Technology and Engineering (national top), A in Food Science and Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering, A- in Architecture, Control Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Management Science and Engineering, totaling 9 disciplines at A- or above, highlighting its strong engineering capabilities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and automation, and other advantageous majors at SCUT continue to be highly recommended, attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shanxi Province is approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition. SCUT is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, making it an inter-provincial application for Shanxi candidates. Its enrollment proportion in Shanxi is about 2.5%–4.7%, not a major source province, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 5193, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 9.3% (which moves the ranking forward), negative reputation public opinion (which suppresses application enthusiasm and moves the ranking backward), and a slight decrease in candidate numbers (easing competition), the enrollment reduction and negative reputation roughly offset each other. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4933, with a range of 4433–5433.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 4933, with a range of 4433–5433. Candidates with rankings in the upper-middle part of the range (about 4400–4700) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (AI Top Class, Electronic Science, Excellent Talent Class). Those in the middle part (about 4700–5100) should mainly target Tier 2 majors (Electrical Class, Computer Class, Software Engineering), while also attempting Tier 1. Candidates in the lower part (about 5100–5400) are advised to primarily use Tier 3 as a safety net, with moderate attempts at Tier 2.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 879 → 905 → 6911 → 1510 → 1127. In 2023, there was an abnormal drop to 6911 (possibly due to the merger of liberal arts batches in that year or the odd-even year effect), recovering to 1510 in 2024, and further rising to 1127 in 2025. In recent two years, there is a forward trend, with the baseline around 1127 in 2025. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plans were 17 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 18 in 2024, and 18 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 26, a significant expansion of about 44.4% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 32nd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, belonging to top-tier comprehensive universities in China. Although liberal arts are not its strongest field, it remains attractive due to its 985 platform. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly due to widespread attention from a campus voyeurism incident, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 87th (average), with low exposure. Management Science and Engineering is rated A- (related to Business Administration), Light Industry Technology and Engineering is A+, etc. Among liberal arts majors, Business Administration can be linked to the A- discipline evaluation of Management Science and Engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for liberal arts majors like Law, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, while Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the number of history category candidates in Shanxi Province is about 63,113, a significant decrease of about 25.6% from 84,879 in 2025, markedly easing competition. South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, which is an inter-provincial application for Shanxi candidates. The university's liberal arts enrollment in Shanxi accounts for about 2.5%–4.7%, not a major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1127, the significant 44.4% expansion in 2026 (which pushes rankings backward), the sharp 25.6% decrease in candidate numbers (which pushes rankings forward), and the negative reputation (suppressing enthusiasm), the easing effect of candidate reduction outweighs the intensifying effect of expansion. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1408, with a range of 1197–1619.
